result.answer: Full-time employees receive 20 paid annual leave days per calendar year.

retrieved_passages.text: Full-time employees receive 20 paid annual leave days per calendar year. Employees may carry over at most 5 unused annual leave days, and carried days expire on March 31 of the following year.
Regular employees receive 10 paid sick days per calendar year. An employee may take up to 5 paid working days of bereavement leave for the death of an immediate family member.

An eligible parent receives 12 weeks of paid parental leave for a birth, adoption, or foster placement. The short-term disability plan replaces 60% of base pay for up to 26 weeks, subject to the plan maximum.

A new employee becomes eligible for a regular remote schedule after 90 calendar days of employment and a satisfactory performance standing. An approved hybrid employee may normally work remotely up to 3 days per workweek.

Eligible employees may receive up to USD 600 per calendar year for approved wellness expenses. After 6 months of service, an employee may receive up to USD 5,000 per calendar year in approved tuition assistance.
Workplace Services and People Operations normally announce a headquarters weather closure by 6:00 a.m. local time. Workplace Services reviews an ergonomic assessment request within 5 business days.

Remote work must remain within the employee's employing country unless Legal, Tax, Information Security, and People Operations give written approval. A remote-location change lasting more than 30 days requires notice to People Operations at least 20 business days in advance.
Health coverage begins on the first day of the month after the employee's start date. A new employee has 30 calendar days from the start date to complete benefits enrollment.
The company contributes 4% of eligible pay when an employee contributes at least 5% of eligible pay to the retirement plan. Company retirement-plan matching contributions are immediately 100% vested.

System owners must review privileged access rights every quarter. Access must be disabled within 4 hours for an involuntary separation and by the end of the last working day for a voluntary separation.

validation.reason: Citation generation and answer validation are disabled for experiments A-C.

retrieved_passages.text: Full-time employees receive 20 paid annual leave days per calendar year. Employees may carry over at most 5 unused annual leave days, and carried days expire on March 31 of the following year.

The company contributes 4% of eligible pay when an employee contributes at least 5% of eligible pay to the retirement plan. Company retirement-plan matching contributions are immediately 100% vested.

retrieved_passages.text: Full-time employees receive 20 paid annual leave days per calendar year. Employees may carry over at most 5 unused annual leave days, and carried days expire on March 31 of the following year.
Regular employees receive 10 paid sick days per calendar year. An employee may take up to 5 paid working days of bereavement leave for the death of an immediate family member.

Eligible employees may receive up to USD 600 per calendar year for approved wellness expenses. After 6 months of service, an employee may receive up to USD 5,000 per calendar year in approved tuition assistance.

A new employee becomes eligible for a regular remote schedule after 90 calendar days of employment and a satisfactory performance standing. An approved hybrid employee may normally work remotely up to 3 days per workweek.

Remote workers must use a private workspace or a headset that prevents confidential conversations from being overheard. Remote employees must be reachable during the core hours of 10:00 a.m. to 3:00 p.m. in their local time zone, Monday through Thursday.
